channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Fujigen/Fgn NJB100RAL-CAG with Black PG #D250123 4.34kg ［Made in Japan］［Neo Classic Series］［YK012］ 2025 - Candy Apple Green Gross — $920.99
item.description:
$920.99 · Brand New · G-CLUB Produced by Kurosawa Music

---------------------------------

To customers in Russian Federation,


Due to COVID-19 outbreak, shipping service temporarily terminated from Japan to Russia.

For the above reason, we would like you to do NOT proceed order/transaction.


-------------------------------------------


Welcome to Kurosawa Yokohama! We can ship anywhere all over the world!!


Thank you for looking! Feel free to ask for more details. Also, please carefully read our shop policy below the guitar description!


----------------------------------

The overwhelmingly popular new color, the beautiful Candy Apple Green!


This is a modified version with a black pickguard!


*The photo was taken with a protective film applied to the pickguard.


The "NJB" from the Neo-Classic series, featuring the classic combination of an alder body and rosewood fingerboard, has been upgraded and is now in stock!


While based on the traditional JB style, this electric bass incorporates new elements to meet modern needs.


In addition to its excellent craftsmanship, it utilizes techniques cultivated over many years of experience, such as fret edge treatment that supports smooth fingering. Many users have also praised the neck grip, saying it's "neither too thick nor too thin and easy to hold."


Newly changed features include the truss rod adjustment position being moved to the neck joint, and the use of Luminlay (phosphorescent) for the side position markers for improved visibility.


The neck joint plate, the heart of this detachable (bolt-on) bass, is made of stainless steel. Prioritizing excellent sound attack, even the mounting screws are made of stainless steel, demonstrating meticulous attention to detail.


The pickups are FGN originals.


The controls are the familiar 2 Volume and 1 Tone configuration. The Tone pot is a push-pull switch; pulling it up switches the connection method between the front and rear pickups from the usual parallel to series. This allows you to switch to a powerful sound that's a step forward, while maintaining the clean, well-behaved tone when both volumes are at full.


A quintessential, classic bass. Please consider it.


Weight: 4.34kg

Accessories: Original gig bag


Please inquire for details.


Construction　Bolt-on Neck

Body Alder

Neck　Maple U-Shape

Fingerboard　Rosewood

Scale　34" (864mm)

Frets　20F Medium Jumbo C.F.S.

Tuners GOTOH® GB2

Bridge GOTOH® 203B-4 (String Pitch = 19mm)

Pickup (Neck) FGN 62J-F

Pickup (Bridge) FGN 62J-R

Controls　2Volume, 1Tone w/ Push-Pull SW (Series/Parallel Select SW)

Body Finish　Gloss

----------------------------------

*Caution!!


To prevent fraudulent purchases, we do not accept PayPal guest checkout.


Please create your PayPal account before make the payment.


Please contact us if you have any questions.

*Notice: As this product is being sold in our retail store and website, there is a possibility that it may be sold out when you place your order. We will cancel the sale if this happens.


Please read our Policies Below:

Customs Tax

International Buyers Please Note:

Import duties, taxes, and charges are not included in the item price or shipping cost. These charges and any import procedures are the buyer's responsibility. Please check with your country's customs office for this info prior to bidding or buying. Customs fees are normally charged by the shipping company or collected when you pick the item up. These fees are not additional shipping charges. We won't under-value merchandise or mark the item as a gift on customs forms. Doing that is against U.S. and international laws.


Shipping

We only ship to PayPal registered address.

Service: FedEx

Tracking URL: FedEx


Please Note:

We won't under-value merchandise or mark the item as a gift on customs forms.　Doing that is against U.S. and international laws. We only ship to PayPal registered address.Please contact us if you reside in countries in which we do not specify shipping service and cost. Please be aware that delivery could be delayed depending on customs inspection, in case of natural disasters, and other reasons such as postal strikes.


Payment

We only Accept PayPal. The item will be shipped within 4 business day after the payment is received. If payment can't be confirmed within 4 days after the close of the auction, a reminder will be sent to you.


Return Policy

Returns accepted. After receiving the item, please contact seller within 7 days.

We do not accept returns or refunds for reasons other than product defects.

Please see more details on Shipping and payments tab.


Others


If you have any problem, please contact us. Your satisfaction is important to us.


About Authenticity

All our items are 100% authentic. We are officially registered as legal business and we have to comply with all rules and regulations including tax requirements from the Japanese government.


About Us

Business hours: 10:00am-9:00pm

(Web order and e-mail are available 24/7.)


T.KUROSAWA & CO.,LTD.

Yokohama


Yokohama Mores 4F, 3-1

Minamisai, Nishi-ku,

Yokohama-shi, Kanagawa　220-0005

item.title: Fujigen/Fgn NJB100RALV-BK-with Black PG #C250267 4.57kg ［5-string］［Made in Japan］［Neo Classic Series］［YK012］ 2025 - Black Gross — $991.42
item.description:
$991.42 · Brand New · G-CLUB Produced by Kurosawa Music

---------------------------------

To customers in Russian Federation,


Due to COVID-19 outbreak, shipping service temporarily terminated from Japan to Russia.

For the above reason, we would like you to do NOT proceed order/transaction.


-------------------------------------------


Welcome to Kurosawa Yokohama! We can ship anywhere all over the world!!


Thank you for looking! Feel free to ask for more details. Also, please carefully read our shop policy below the guitar description!


----------------------------------

A classic Fujigen bass with an alder body and rosewood fingerboard! Modified into an all-black version with a black body and black pickguard! If you're unsure which 5-string bass to choose, this is it!


*The photo shows the pickguard with protective film applied.


This electric bass is based on the traditional JB style, but incorporates new elements to meet modern needs.


The quality of construction is exceptional, and the smooth fret edge treatment, honed over many years of experience, is evident. The neck grip is also highly praised by many users for its comfortable, neither too thick nor too thin, feel.


Luminlay (phosphorescent) is used for the side position markers, improving visibility.


The neck joint plate, a crucial element of this detachable (bolt-on) bass, is made of stainless steel. Emphasis is placed on excellent sound attack, and even the set screws are made of stainless steel.


The pickups are FGN originals.


The controls are the familiar 2 Volume and 1 Tone. The Tone pot is a push-pull switch; pulling it up switches the connection method between the front and rear pickups from the usual parallel to series. This allows you to switch to a more powerful sound while maintaining the clean, well-behaved tone you get with both volume at full.


A beautifully designed, classic bass. Please consider it.


Weight: 4.57kg

Accessories: Original gig bag


Please inquire for details.


Construction Bolt-on Neck

Body Alder

Neck　Maple U-Shape

Fingerboard Rosewood

Scale　34" (864mm)

Frets　21F Medium Jumbo C.F.S.

Tuners GOTOH® GB11W

Bridge GOTOH® 205B-5 (String Pitch = 18mm)

Pickup (Neck) FGN 62J5-F

Pickup (Bridge) FGN 62J5-R

Controls　2Volume, 1Tone w/ Push-Pull SW (Series/Parallel Select SW)

Body Finish　Gloss

----------------------------------

*Caution!!


To prevent fraudulent purchases, we do not accept PayPal guest checkout.


Please create your PayPal account before make the payment.


Please contact us if you have any questions.

*Notice: As this product is being sold in our retail store and website, there is a possibility that it may be sold out when you place your order. We will cancel the sale if this happens.


Please read our Policies Below:

Customs Tax

International Buyers Please Note:

Import duties, taxes, and charges are not included in the item price or shipping cost. These charges and any import procedures are the buyer's responsibility. Please check with your country's customs office for this info prior to bidding or buying. Customs fees are normally charged by the shipping company or collected when you pick the item up. These fees are not additional shipping charges. We won't under-value merchandise or mark the item as a gift on customs forms. Doing that is against U.S. and international laws.


Shipping

We only ship to PayPal registered address.

Service: FedEx

Tracking URL: FedEx


Please Note:

We won't under-value merchandise or mark the item as a gift on customs forms.　Doing that is against U.S. and international laws. We only ship to PayPal registered address.Please contact us if you reside in countries in which we do not specify shipping service and cost. Please be aware that delivery could be delayed depending on customs inspection, in case of natural disasters, and other reasons such as postal strikes.


Payment

We only Accept PayPal. The item will be shipped within 4 business day after the payment is received. If payment can't be confirmed within 4 days after the close of the auction, a reminder will be sent to you.


Return Policy

Returns accepted. After receiving the item, please contact seller within 7 days.

We do not accept returns or refunds for reasons other than product defects.

Please see more details on Shipping and payments tab.


Others


If you have any problem, please contact us. Your satisfaction is important to us.


About Authenticity

All our items are 100% authentic. We are officially registered as legal business and we have to comply with all rules and regulations including tax requirements from the Japanese government.


About Us

Business hours: 10:00am-9:00pm

(Web order and e-mail are available 24/7.)


T.KUROSAWA & CO.,LTD.

Yokohama


Yokohama Mores 4F, 3-1

Minamisai, Nishi-ku,

Yokohama-shi, Kanagawa　220-0005

item.title: Fender Standard Jazz Bass 2012 MIM — $658.83
item.description:
$658.83 · Good · Astronauts Guitars

Fender Standard Jazz Bass


Key Features

– 2012 Mexico-made Standard Series Jazz Bass, the precursor to the Player Series line

– The classic alder / maple / rosewood specs deliver Standard Jazz Bass tone that works across any genre

– Gloss-finished headstock and a naturally aged white finish with mint green guard for an elegant and sharp vibe

– It has minor marks and finish yellowing, but overall it remains in relatively good used condition.


This is a straightforward, easy-to-handle bass, making it a great choice both for a beginner and as a reliable backup for a more experienced player.


Specs

– Body: Alder

– Neck: Maple

– Fingerboard: Rosewood

– Scale: Long (34”/864mm)

– Frets: 20

– Weight: 4.2kg

– Year: 2012

– Included: Generic soft case


Playability

– Straight neck with no twisting or warping

– Both directions of the truss rod work properly

– Comfortable, easy-to-manage setup

– A practical player’s bass that works well as a first serious instrument or a reliable backup


Condition

– Parts replaced: None

– Damages: Finish yellowing, dings, scuffs, and small finish chips

– Neck: Straight, with no warp or twist

– Frets: Still have solid life left; the lowest point measures 0.9mm, about 80% left

– Truss rod: Works fine in both directions


Setup

– 12th fret action: 2.0mm 1st string / 2.5mm 4th string


Recommended Player

A beginner looking for a straightforward, easy-to-play Standard Jazz Bass that can support you in any future direction, or for a more experienced player considering a reliable backup Jazz Bass that suits a wide range of genres.

Questions or extra photos? Feel free to contact us. If you’re ready, buy now and make it yours.


Please note

- We are unable to accept price negotiations, as the listed price already reflects our best.

- The shipping fees listed on the item page are reference prices and may differ from the actual shipping cost (including Reverb and PayPal fees.) While the amounts are accurate for many countries, they may vary significantly for others.

- All customs taxes and VAT are the buyers’ responsibility. Please check out the requirements for your country.

- All items are also for sale in our physical workshop in Takadanobaba. There is a chance they might be sold out.

- We sell only at Reverb for customers from outside Japan.

- We accept payment only through Reverb platform.

item.title: Atelier Z babyZ-4J Active -Orange- #252369[3.65kg][Short scale][IKE011] — $954.53
item.description:
$954.53 · Brand New · Kurosawa Music Ikebukuro

Thank you for looking! Feel free to ask for more details. Also, please carefully read our shop policy below the guitar description!

------------------------------------------------------------

[Tokyo Musical Instruments Expo 2025 Limited Edition Model]

Since its establishment in 1989, ATELIER Z has continuously developed instruments through collaborations with top-tier bassists—such as the late Tomohito Aoki—and has created numerous masterpieces by adopting a unique approach that incorporates professional-grade setups and active circuitry.

The reliable sound, crafted by integrating feedback from professional bassists, has garnered support from a wide range of players, from professionals to amateurs.


"ATELIER Z DESIGN" is a new series that achieves excellent cost-performance through overseas production.

This particular instrument is a special model: originally produced as a limited run for the Tokyo Musical Instrument Fair 2025, it has since undergone an "active modification" at ATELIER Z's Tokyo workshop.


It features authentic specifications throughout, utilizing an alder body, maple neck, and rosewood fingerboard.

It is equipped with "New Baby-4J" pickups, developed specifically for this model.


Despite its charming appearance, the sound delivers power combined with the soft, warm low-end texture characteristic of a short-scale bass.

The orange finish further amplifies its cuteness to the max!

Yet, the sound is strictly professional-grade. While offering the benefits of a short-scale instrument, it also delivers clear articulation and a crisp, punchy response when switched to active mode.


Thanks to the unique pitch characteristics of the short scale and powerful, original Japanese-made pickups that highlight the presence of each string, this model achieves the signature ATELIER Z "Magnitude Sound"—reminiscent of the brand's famous M#245 and M#265 models.


With a US-made Bartolini XTCT preamp at its heart, it is truly a "little giant" overflowing with power!


Whether as a primary instrument, a casual bass for home practice, or a choice for guitarists and beginners alike, this is a bass we hope a wide variety of players will pick up and enjoy!


We look forward to your inquiries.
-----------------------------------

【SPEC】


Body: Alder

Neck: Maple/Rosewood (Carbon Support Bar)

Scale: 30"

Frets: 19

Tuners: Elephant Ear style

Bridge: 2-saddle bass bridge (18P)

Pickups: ATELIER Z New babyZ-4J x 2

Preamp: Bartolini XTCT

Controls: Front Vol / Rear Vol, Master Tone / Switch (Active ON/OFF), Treble / Bass


Weight: Approx. 3.65 kg

Included: Dedicated BabyZ gig bag


------------------------------------


Payment
We only Accept PayPal. The item will be shipped within 4 business day after the payment is received. If payment can't be confirmed within 4 days after the close of the auction, a reminder will be sent to you.
*Caution!!

To prevent fraudulent purchases, we do not accept PayPal guest checkout.

Please create your PayPal account before make the payment.

Return Policy

Returns accepted. After receiving the item, please contact seller within 14 days. Please see more details on Shipping and payments tab.

OthersIf you have any problem, please contact us. Your satisfaction is important to us.

About Authenticity
All our items are 100% authentic. We are officially registered as legal business and we have to comply with all rules and regulations including tax requirements from the Japanese government.

About Us
Business hours: 11:00am-8:00pm
(Web order and e-mail are available 24/7.)

T.KUROSAWA & CO.,LTD.
Ikebukuro
1-25-１１B1F, Minami Ikebukuro
Toshimaku, Tokyo 171-0022

item.title: D'Mark - Natural — $2,900
item.description:
$2,900 · Excellent · Ranman8888

D' Mark 5-string Jazz Bass. Active electronics. Excellent condition. Comes with a hard gig bag.

item.title: Fender Player Jazz Bass - black — $850
item.description:
$850 · Excellent · Ranman8888

Fender Jazz Bass with EMG active pickups. Routed out under the pick guard for battery. Does not come with a case.

item.title: Warwick Pro Series Corvette $$ 4st Limited Edition 2023 — $4,200
item.description:
$4,200 · Excellent · Gemini13

Purchased in November 2025 brand new and seldom played. Still in Like-New condition with a pro setup and no cosmetic defects.

limited edition 2023 model, only 100 pcs. worldwide (4- and 5-string combined)

  • right-hand version
  • 4-string electric bass
  • 34" (864 mm) long scale
  • flat body shape
  • 3/8" selected Marbled Ebony top (Masterreserve)
  • Roasted Swamp Ash body
  • 5-piece Roasted Flamed Maple neck with Ekanga stripes (C shape)
  • Tigerstripe Ebony fretboard
  • 24 brass jumbo frets, extra high, extra hard (width: 0.11" (2.9 mm) / height: 0.05" (1.3 mm))
  • Invisible Fret Technology (IFT)
  • F clef (bass clef) inlay at 12th fret
  • 20" fretboard radius
  • Just-A-Nut III (brass) nut
  • 1.5" (38.5 mm) nut width
  • passive MEC MM-Style quad coil humbucker pickup with brushed metal cover (neck)
  • passive MEC MM-Style quad coil humbucker pickup with brushed metal cover (bridge)
  • active MEC 3-way electronics
  • controls for Volume (P/P) / Balance / Mid / Treble and Bass (stacked)
  • push/pull function for preamp bypass
  • 2x 3-way toggle switch for humbucker pickup configuration (series / parallel / single coils
  • Warwick 2-piece 3D bridge and tailpiece (brass)
  • Natural Oil finish
  • black hardware
  • incl. Warwick Masterbuilt Genuine Leather User Kit - Black (RB PROD USER KIT WBK)
  • incl. individual Certificate of Authenticity
  • made in Germany

item.title: Sadowsky Guitars USED MasterBuilt 24-Fret Modern Bass Swamp Ash 5st (Natural High Polish) '22 — $3,916.14
item.description:
$3,916.14 · Very Good · Ikebe Music

Our Business Hours is Mon to Fri / 11:00 to 18:00 JPN time
We will close Sat and Sun, so we will reply to inquiry that received weekend on next week.
Your understanding will be appreciated.

We are receiving the customer order with first comes first serves basis both on website and at real shop.
So occasionally it will be sold out while having email communication.
Please understand in advance.

Japanese consumption tax is not required for international shopping. However you may be required to pay duty, tax and import fee when receiving your items in your country. You must pay all these duty, tax and fee as receiver/importer and we do not cover any of them.

■Please note
The product description is an automatic translation of the Japanese description. Please contact us if you have any questions.

-----------------------------------

Please be noted this one is USED not new.
There is not any issue on the function and the playing condition but blemishes on the cosmetic.
Please send message for more detail information of the condition.

-----------------------------------

A great deal on a beautiful, used "MasterBuilt" series guitar, the top-of-the-line model made in Germany!

Founded in 1979, Sadowsky Guitars established the "Active JB" style, now adopted by many manufacturers, through modifying instruments for New York studio musicians, including Marcus Miller's famous '77 JB, and manufacturing its own brand of instruments. This introduced new possibilities for bass sound to the music scene from the 1980s onward. With a sound variation that can accommodate all musical genres, low noise, and ultimate functionality, Sadowsky basses are truly instruments for working musicians.

The "MasterBuilt" is a high-grade version of the regular "MetroLine" model, featuring a high-quality swamp ash body carefully selected from Warwick's vast wood stock and a roasted maple neck. The difference in sound is immediately noticeable.

Despite its lightweight design, this 5-string, 24-fret model from the company can firmly support the band's bassline. Equipped with a humbucking pickup near the bridge, this model, while based on a J-style design, offers a unique sound compared to single-coil models, boasting a rich midrange and tight low end.

In terms of condition, there are some minor scratches and signs of use on the pickups and bridge, two light dents on the fretboard, several dents on the bottom and back of the body, and a few minor scratches on the neck. However, these are all natural damages that occurred during playing, and I don't think they will be a problem when playing.
The frets, neck condition, truss rod function, and electronics are all in perfect working order, resulting in a comfortable playing experience.

Sadowsky Masterbuilt models are in short supply and we are rarely able to offer them in abundance.
Don't miss out on these great deals on used items!

Sadowsky Professional Road Bag, Certificate/Spec Sheet, Manual, Adjustment Wrench x3, Strap Lock


Chambered American Swamp Ash body
Roasted Maple neck
Roasted Maple fingerboard (12 Radius)
Sadowsky Just-A-Nut III nut (1.875?(47.6 mm)?nut width)
24?nickel silver frets (width: 0.094 (2.4 mm) / height: 0.051 (1.3 mm))
34 long scale / 19mm string spacing
Sadowsky Passive Soapbar pickups
Sadowsky 2-way electronics (bass and treble boost) with Vintage Tone Control (VTC)
Controls for Volume / Balance / Vintage Tone Control (P/P - preamp bypass) / Treble and Bass (stacked)
Sadowsky Light machine heads with open gear
Sadowsky S-security locks
Sadowsky bridge with quick string release
Chrome Hardware
Natural High Polish
Weight ≈ 3.66 kg
Made in Germany

item.title: Status USED ​​Streamline 4st — $3,322.79
item.description:
$3,322.79 · Very Good · Ikebe Music

Our Business Hours is Mon to Fri / 11:00 to 18:00 JPN time
We will close Sat and Sun, so we will reply to inquiry that received weekend on next week.
Your understanding will be appreciated.

We are receiving the customer order with first comes first serves basis both on website and at real shop.
So occasionally it will be sold out while having email communication.
Please understand in advance.

Japanese consumption tax is not required for international shopping. However you may be required to pay duty, tax and import fee when receiving your items in your country. You must pay all these duty, tax and fee as receiver/importer and we do not cover any of them.

■Please note
The product description is an automatic translation of the Japanese description. Please contact us if you have any questions.

-----------------------------------

Please be noted this one is USED not new.
There is not any issue on the function and the playing condition but blemishes on the cosmetic.
Please send message for more detail information of the condition.

-----------------------------------

Excellent used condition!
A compact and ultra-lightweight model from Status!

Founded in the UK in 1981, Status Graphite is known as a pioneering brand that actively utilizes carbon fiber/graphite materials, achieving superior rigidity, stable neck performance, and a clear, responsive sound. Their flexible yet robust graphite necks are less susceptible to changes in temperature and humidity, making them highly reliable in all environments, including live performances and recording sessions. Their instruments, combining innovative design, sound, and exceptional playability, have earned high praise from many professional musicians, including Mark King.

The "Streamline" model defies the image of hard, inorganic graphite with its thick, rich sound, and retains the flexible yet powerful, active sound that is characteristic of Status, while also achieving an ultra-lightweight and compact size for easy transport.

The dual-coil pickups allow you to select between "neck coil / both coils / bridge coil" using mini-switches for both the front and rear pickups, and together with the 2-band EQ, a wide range of tonal settings are possible.

Furthermore, it features an optional Top & Side LED (Blue) built into the fretboard, and a mini-switch allows you to turn the side only, OFF, or both top and side ON! This is a highly recommended guitar that will definitely stand out on stage.

There are some signs of use, including a few light scratches and scuffs, mainly on the body, but there is no major damage, and overall it is in very good condition. The frets and neck are in good condition, and the truss rod and electronics are working without any problems.

This graphite model is now a rare find.
Don't miss it!!

Original soft case (※ Zipper on top pocket is damaged)


■Body & Neck: Headless one-piece, woven graphite composite molding Ultra-compact body styling
■Scale: 34 Inch
■Frets: 24F
■Pickups: Two Status soap-bar pickups
■Preamp: Status two-band EQ
■Controls: PU Blend, Volume, Treble, Bass, 3-way Coil Select Switch x2, LED Switch (Side LED / Off / Top&Side LED)
■Weight: ≈3.15kg

item.title: Maruszczyk Jazzus 5 2024 — $1,790.97
item.description:
$1,790.97 · Excellent · Bass & Tone

Here is my Maruszczyk Jazzus 5 for sale! This was designed as a progression of the Elwood, optimized for a perfect balance by changing the body and headstock shape. As with the Elwood it's a fantastic player. It is in excellent condition and fitted with a Delano preamp. Included is a hardcase.

Trades welcome!

Year - 2024

Serial Number - 170345

Colour - Brandy Breath

Body Finish - Gloss front/Satin back and sides

Body Wood - Alder with swamp ash facing

Neck Finish - Satin

Neck Wood - Maple

Fretboard - Rosewood

Body Wood - Alder with swamp ash facing

Neck Finish - Satin

Neck Wood - Maple

Fretboard - Rosewood

Frets - 22

Scale Length - 32"

Weight - 8lb 6oz / 3.8kg

Electronics - Active

Pickups - Bassculture

Gigbag/Hardcase - Hardcase

item.title: Fender Precision Bass Guitar PBD-62 1993 - Olympic White MIJ — $995
item.description:
$995 · Very Good · Degroovia

Fender Precision Bass Guitar PBD-62 1993 - Olympic White. Made in Japan, Gloss body and neck finish, Basswood body, Oval C shaped Maple neck with a 7.25" radius Rosewood fingerboard and vintage size frets, 34" scale length, 111/16th" nut width, Stock split single coil Precision Bass pickup with the master volume and tone controls, Vintage style bridge with the barrel steel saddles, Vintage style open gear tuners, The neck thickness is .80" at the first and .97" at the 12th frets, 8.2 pounds. Some dings and dents on the body and the back of the neck. Still in very good condition cosmetically and in perfect functioning order. It currently has flat wound strings. Comes with Fender gig bag pictured. Thanks for looking. Please message me with any questions.

item.title: Fender Highway One USA Jazz Bass 2008 Midnight Wine MIA — $1,199.42
item.description:
$1,199.42 · Very Good · MNRV

Great Fenderl Highway One Jazz bass from 2008 in a lovely nitro midnight wine finish. Sounds superb, looks incredible.

A classic made in the USA workhorse bass that blends vintage style with modern playability. Featuring a poplar body, rosewood neck with a Modern "C" profile and the a badass bass II bridge. Specs below.

The 2008 Fender catalogue outlined the specs as follows:


“The one-and-only Highway One Jazz Bass® guitar features a host of upgrades and new features, including an alder body, modern "C"-shaped maple neck with 20-fret rosewood fingerboard and '70s headstock decal, a BADASS™ Il bridge with grooved saddles, Greasebucket™ tone circuit, three-ply parchment pickguard and a satin nitrocellulose lacquer finish that will wear more easily to reflect the journey you take together.”

Has been well played as a touring bass and has a nice road worn patina that gives it character. This makes it all the more playable - sounds and looks as a great Jazz Bass should.

Includes original Fender 60th anniversary bag.

Highway One basses - like this one - get a lot of love from their devotees, especially the Mk2 versions with the improved neck profile, and upgraded Badass Bridge.

Set up to play with some new medium gauge strings, but could of course use a tweak to your preferences. Selling as I’ve acquired a few basses in trades recently and I really only need one!

item.title: Wood Custom Guitars Vibe Standard-5 19pitch Model - Olympic White - [4.10kg] — $2,889.38
item.description:
$2,889.38 · Very Good · Kurosawa Music Ochanomizu

*Caution!!

To prevent fraudulent purchases, we do not accept PayPal guest checkout.

Please create your PayPal account before make the payment.




We’ve received a 5-string model in relatively good condition from Wood Custom Guitars, a Japanese brand based in Shiga Prefecture.

Their commitment to wood is truly worthy of the “Wood” name, and the instrument’s overwhelming tonal quality has captivated countless musicians, both professional and amateur alike.


This particular guitar features a one-piece ash body, a maple neck, and a maple fingerboard.

It is equipped with a Bartolini B-Axis J55J pickup; the preamp appears to have been replaced and currently features a Bartolini XTCT+MCT-500.

The control knobs include MVol, Balancer, MTone, and a 3-band EQ, while the switches include a Passive/Active toggle and an MCT-500 bypass switch.

The spec sheet lists a 3-way switch with a variable middle position, so it’s likely that this was modified to a 2-way switch with an MCT-500 bypass following the preamp upgrade.

When you flip this switch to bypass the MCT-500, it produces a fuller, richer tone than the sound processed through the MCT.

Additionally, while the battery compartment was originally designed for 18V, one side is now a dummy terminal, so it currently operates on 9V.


As this is a used item, there are some minor scratches, but it remains in relatively good condition.

The truss rod has plenty of adjustment left, and there is ample fret life remaining, making this a guitar ready to play right out of the box.

Don’t miss this opportunity.


Weight: Approx. 4.10 kg

Included Accessories: Non-original soft case, finger lamp, wrench, spec sheet



*Please note that there may be some minor scratches or stains on the body and accessories for B grade new, Outlet New, and New Special Price items.


*We try to reflect the inventory display corresponding to the sale of listed items as quickly as possible, but there may be a time lag,

However, there may be a time lag. Please understand that there may be a time lag.


*Notice-


As this product is being sold in retail stores alongside online stores, there is a possibility that it may be sold out.

Please kindly cancel the order if this happens.


Customs Tax


International Buyers Please Note:

Import duties, taxes, and charges are not included in the item price or shipping cost. These charges are the buyer's responsibility.

Please check with your country's customs office to determine what these additional costs will be prior to bidding or buying.

Customs fees are normally charged by the shipping company or collected when you pick the item up. These fees are not additional shipping charges.

We won't under-value merchandise or mark the item as a gift on customs forms. Doing that is against U.S. and international laws.


Shipping

We only ship to PayPal registered address.


Service: EMS or FedEx


Tracking URL: Japan Post, FedEx


Please Note:

We won't under-value merchandise or mark the item as a gift on customs forms. @Doing that is against U.S. and international laws.

We only ship to PayPal registered address.

Please contact us if you reside in countries in which we do not specify shipping service and cost.

Please be aware that delivery could be delayed depending on customs inspection, in case of natural disasters, and other reasons such as postal strikes.


Payment

We only Accept PayPal.

The item will be shipped within 4 business day after the payment is received.

If payment can't be confirmed within 4 days after the close of the auction, a reminder will be sent to you.


Return Policy

Contact the seller within 3 days of receiving the item.

Please see the "Shipping & Payment" tab for more information.

Returns will only be accepted if the item is defective.

Returns for customer convenience will not be accepted. (Color is not what you expected, heavy, hard to play, lost, etc.).

Cancellations made by the customer will be subject to a 10% handling fee in addition to the shipping fee in any case. Please understand this in advance.


Others

If you have any problem, please contact us. Your satisfaction is important to us.


About Authenticity

All our items are 100% authentic.

We are officially registered as legal business and we have to comply with all rules and @regulations including tax requirements from the Japanese government.

item.title: MTD Kingston ZX-5 (Upgraded) — $1,800
item.description:
$1,800 · Good · eKEA sYSTEMS lLC

This bass has been upgraded with USA hardware, Nordstrand pickups and preamp, all work professionally done by Carey Nordstrand. This bass was previously owned by Andy Irvin.

The MTD Kingston ZX is a precision-crafted 5-string bass built for players who demand the feel, tone and refinement of a premium professional instrument without compromise.

item.title: Michael Kelly Dragonfly 4 Port Java Ebony Fretless - Natural — $650
item.description:
$650 · Excellent · Kirk’s Shop of Bass Stuff

Selling my Michael Kelly Fretless bass with TKL hard case (these basses don’t not typically come with a case). Its in great condition and electronics function as they should. Previous owner added the thumb rest which has perfect placement. Will ship Signature Required and sorry, no trades. Take a look at my feedback and buy with confidence.

item.title: 2001 Ken Smith BSR6W Bass Guitar — $6,499
item.description:
$6,499 · Good · BAMonBASS Gear Emporium

2001 Ken Smith BSR6 6 string Bass guitar. Sounds amazing with the walnut body wings and maple core. ships in Mono gig bag

item.title: CMI Strat style bass 80/90s - Olympic white / creme — $199
item.description:
$199 · Good · GUITAR WARS

Used but plays and sounds great. Someone took out the frets and made it a fretless. Action is high and we couldn’t lower it anymore. Vintage 80/90s Korean. All electronics work. Super cool and kinda rare. No case or bag. Minor wear and tear as shown. Nothing serious or damaging. Great for beginners and or parts or projects. Any questions feel free to ask.

item.title: Gibson EB-0F Fuzztone 1962 — $4,950
item.description:
$4,950 · Very Good · VWG Tech

well, here is one of these impossible to find pieces!

item.title: Squier MIJ 80s — $1,300
item.description:
$1,300 · Very Good · Horder

Rare 1980s medium scale pbass. These are 32 inch basses. They are hard to find, and are tons of fun. The build of them are fantastic.

item.title: Sadowsky Metroline Vintage JJ 5 Japan 2013 - Olympic White — $2,800
item.description:
$2,800 · Very Good · Tom 's Gear Garage

Metroline JJ Made in Japan!

I have a 2013 Metroline Sadowsky, made in Japan, many will agree that these Japanese Sadowsky‘s are superior to the current German ones. Swirling on the pick guard and back of the bass. One small imperfection on headstock. a clear coat crack in neck pocket, checked out by my local luthier and he confirmed it’s clearcoat only. Everything in working order. This bass has the legendary Sadowsky VTC preamp as well. Original Sadowsky case. Very sturdy.
This is too much bass for me, and I am primarily a 4 string player.

-swamp ash body

-maple neck/board

-Sadowsky preamp VTC with active/passive push-pull tone controls

-treble and bass boost only

-volume and pup selector

Sadowsky jazz pups

-hipshot lightweight tuners

-8.8lb

item.title: Hohner B2 V 1988 - gloss black — $400
item.description:
$400 · Good · ACF Custom

1988 Hohner B2 V 5 string headless bass, with carry bag.

Modeled after and licensed by Steinberger, these Hohner basses were some of the finest crafted versions of the venerable "boat oar" style basses from the 80s.

This is a passive bass with VVT controls and it has plenty of output and tone shaping ability to make you quite happy in any sort of music you want to do.

It's lightweight and small, making it a great travel bass as well. You still get the full 34" scale, so it feels like a real bass in your hands, not a toy.

It's in really nice condition for its age. Frets have some wear, but nothing terrible. Truss rod works fine, action is nice and comfortable. All electronics function properly.

Sold as is, no returns. Please ask any questions you'd like.

item.title: Fender Deluxe Active Jazz Bass V 1998 - 2015 - Brown Sunburst — $598
item.description:
$598 · Very Good · Chan

5-string Made in Mexico (2013) Fender Noiseless pickups Active electronics 3-Tone Sunburst finish

item.title: Starmaker Bass Guitar - Bass Guitars - Pink – Bass Guitar - Poor — $77.20
item.description:
$77.20 · Poor · Audio Trader

Starmaker Bass Guitar - Bass Guitars - Pink – Bass Guitar - Poor Why This One
  • Entry-level bass with a classic solid-body build and passive electronics.
  • A low-cost entry point for a beginner picking up bass for the first time.
Condition: Poor

This Starmaker Bass Guitar is a poor-condition bass guitar. This unit has not been functionally tested by our team. Note: Instrument has multiple cracks and should be assessed before use. Please review all photos carefully, as they provide an accurate representation of the cosmetic condition of the product.

What's Included
  • Starmaker Bass Guitar (Pink – Bass Guitar)
  • No additional accessories included
About This Model

The Starmaker Bass Guitar is an entry-level electric bass with a traditional solid-body design, intended for beginners or younger players taking their first steps on the instrument. It features the standard bass configuration of four strings, a magnetic pickup, and passive electronics routed to an output jack for use with an amplifier. The pink finish gives it a distinctive look aimed at younger or style-conscious players.

A great opportunity to own a Starmaker Bass Guitar at this price point.

item.title: Hofner B-Bass Icon Series 90/2010s - Tobacco burst — $449
item.description:
$449 · Good · GUITAR WARS

Used but plays and sounds great. minor wear and tear as shown but nothing serious or damaging. No case or bag. “Beatles“ style bass with the matching sticker like Pauls. Any questions feel free to ask.

item.title: Olympia by Tacoma OB3CE Acoustic-Electric Bass Guitar w/ Hard Case & New Strings — $420
item.description:
$420 · Very Good · MIKHAIL's Gear Garage

**Up for sale is a rare and highly regarded Olympia by Tacoma OB3CE Acoustic-Electric Bass Guitar.**


Designed by Tacoma Guitars as an affordable version of the legendary Thunderchief bass, this instrument delivers incredible natural acoustic volume, warmth, and excellent projection that easily holds its own in acoustic jams.


This bass features a comfortable cutaway body for upper fret access, an offset wing soundhole, and is equipped with a premium Fishman Classic 4T preamp/EQ system with a built-in tuner for flawless plugged-in performance.


**What’s Included in the Bundle:**

* Olympia by Tacoma OB3CE Acoustic-Electric Bass (Serial No. 02040036 - Manufactured in Feb 2004)

* Fitted Hardshell Case (Perfect fit, secure latches)

* Brand New, Factory Sealed Pack of Premium D'Addario Bass Strings


**Condition:**

* Body & Neck: [Insert condition here, e.g., Excellent used condition with only minor signs of play wear. No cracks, no structural repairs.]

* Electronics: 100% fully functional. The Fishman preamp and built-in tuner work perfectly.

* Frets & Playability: Fretboard is in great shape, nice low action, and straight neck.


**Shipping & Location:**

Located in Los Angeles, CA. Local pickup is welcome and preferred to save on shipping costs! Otherwise, it will be packed professionally and shipped securely with tracking.

item.title: Dean Edge 1 6-String 2022 - Present - Vintage Mahogany — $449
item.description:
$449 · Good · GUITAR WARS

Used but plays and sounds great. 6 string but missing the 1st string and sadly we don’t have a replacement. Minor wear and tear all over but nothing serious or damaging. Active pickups. Does not come with a case or bag. Any questions feel to ask

item.title: Definitive technology Inc Sub & Amp — $175
item.description:
$175 · Good · AUDIO~ECSTASY~So~Cal~

This is a sub woofer 15" from a high end home system. I play guitar and got a great deal on a Fener bass so I played thru this system just thru the sub and it sounds great even rattled the walls. Perfect for home use even small venues. It sound great at low levels and higher volume.

You will be surprised by the sound this makes

I may trade, I don't need much??

Thanks

Shipping is at $100 this is not the price. We will need to figure out the cost later I figure it out in a few days I hope it sell close, it is heavy.

item.title: Sterling Bongo 2025 - Present - Firemist Purple — $649
item.description:
$649 · Excellent · GUITAR WARS

Used but like new. Almost entirely free from any blemishes. Plays and sounds great. Nice thick bassy tone. Active pickups. Does not come with a case or bag. Any questions feel free to ask

item.title: Lakland Skyline 55-02 Deluxe — $1,400
item.description:
$1,400 · Excellent · Music & More

This Lakland 55-02 is in mint condition and has been meticulously cared for from day one. It has never left my home or been used for live gigs, ensuring it remains free from the wear and tear typically associated with stage or travel use. Every aspect of this bass has been maintained to the highest standard, with all setups and routine maintenance performed exclusively by a seasoned/highly experienced guitar technician. As a result, it plays flawlessly with exceptional tone, smooth action, and rock-solid reliability. Cosmetically and functionally, it is as close to new as you can get. Goodluck!

item.title: Fender Fender PJ Precition bass 1982 - Nitro Lacquer — $2,500
item.description:
$2,500 · Good · Steven-007

Made in USA. 1982 first run triple 000 series with original hard shell tweed case. Original nitro lacquer finish and anodized gold guard replicating the original 1957 P basses. Original owner used flat wound strings (which set is included in sale) and as a result, neck exhibits virually no fret wear. Two tiny holes near bridge is for PU cover. Instrument has new round wound strings which is a standard option for new Fender basses. This did have EMG jazz PU mod when acquired, but experienced CT luthier replaced all with pickups with new Fender Yosemite pickups made in Corona CA USA . The EMG mod pickups which were replaced are included in sale. See reverb P bass sales of Japanese nitro P basses that have sold in 2300+. FREE SHIPPING in USA

item.title: Warwick Corvette 1996 - Germany-Swamp Ash-Wenge — $900
item.description:
$900 · Excellent · Cape Studio Guitars

Stunning Nirvana Black Solid Wenge neck with Brass just a nut and Bronze Warwick frets. Still polishes up fine w Warwick polish included! Serial 030416. Strap locks orig to bass. 9 pounds of solid beauty!Swamp ash is stunning and so herd to photograph. It is a work of art...Expand the pictures to see the grain of the solid Wenge neck.. It is a work of art! Original “Made in Germany” (Markneukirchen factory) Warwick Corvette Standard (up graded to Bartolini active pickups) – Incredible Bass guitar with amazing sound, tone and feel. Features a high quality tone wood Solid Swamp Ash body and much sought after Wenge neck. (Warwick switched to Ovangkol necks post 1998). SPECS below.
Don’t confuse this bass with the Korean Pro Series or Chinese made Rockbass, these pre 1998 German made ones are of the highest quality. Includes Gig bag w Warwick case, manuals, Warwigk Binder is beautiful, and truss rod etc and Warwick polish I kept for a very long time and used to get a mirror finish and protect the finish...! Plays beautifully and will most likely need a set up as Im not a bass player but used this for many years for recordings. Stunning satin finish made in Germany and original silver hardware included as I switched out to bronze Warwick hardware straight replacement and absolutely no new holes. Maintained very well as its just a real nice dense and small and solid neck feels good to hold all day! Has normal marks of use as it was played , and is almost 30 years old. Only minor marks on bottom edge of the body. The back of the bass has some marks from shirt snaps etc... Above the pickups there are worn spots from thumb nail from resting my thumb on the pickups In the electronics compartment the battery connector went bad and was replaced. The 9v battery rest inside of a foam cut sleeve that sits inside of the compartment.. ..but the Nirvana finish is very difficult to see marks. Plays as it should and all controls work perfectly.
Comes with strap/strap locksSelling some of my studio gear . Shipping only to USA. Payment expected within 24 hours. This is a pro bass and sounds wonderful and has a wide range os settings, push pull, etc all original MEC active pre-amp (push/pull volume knob (to bypass active pickups)!

Specs:
Weight: 9lbs.
Bass: Corvette Standard swamp ash 4 string
Serial Number: D-030416-96
Year: 1996
Month: April
Number: 030416
Neck Wood: Wenge Wood
Fingerboard: Wenge Wood
Frets: Bronze Warwick Frets
Nut: Just a Nut Brass Version
Neck Construction: Bolt On
Body: Swamp Ash
Surface: Satin finish Nirvana Black
Pickups: Bartolini active (9v)
Electronics: MEC active pre-amp (push/pull volume knob (to bypass active pickups)
Hardware: Chrome Hardware made for Warwick
Made in Germany / Markneukirchen

item.title: Bassmods K534 — $1,700
item.description:
$1,700 · Excellent · Luke's Gear Garage

It’s In great condition, with a fresh set of elixir strings on it. It comes with a gator soft shell gig bag.

item.title: Fender USA Dimension Deluxe 2015 — $1,375
item.description:
$1,375 · Good · String, Things, and BaDa-Bing!

Great condition but some minor pick scratches! Includes original case.

item.title: Fender Standard Precision Bass 2025 - Present - Black — $500
item.description:
$500 · Very Good · Chase's Boutique

Cherry Cola 2024 Indonesian with a scratched off serial number. Has been used for about a year, solid condition, classic p bass punch.

item.title: Spector Euro 4 LX 2010s - Black Matte — $2,500
item.description:
$2,500 · Very Good · Obi’s Gear Shop

Incredible Spector Euro 4 LX Matte Black bass guitar available!

This is my favorite bass I’ve ever owned. Incredible tone, looks fantastic, and plays like a dream. Unfortunately, I’m just not playing much these days and it’s time to find a new home for this beauty.
Comes with a very cool leather Spector gig bag, and has several upgrades including a HipShot D-Tuner (original tuning peg also included), and flush mount strap locks.
This bass has been well loved and well played. There are several marks in the finish, and one of the the strap buttons has come out and been repaired. It’s character!!
Bonus fun fact - Dave Ellefson of Megadeth once played Tornado of Souls on this bass!

Asking $2500 OBO. Not desperate or in any rush. Hoping this can go to someone who will appreciate it as much as I have!

Let me know if you have any questions.

item.title: LPC Latt Combs Scorpion fretless bass guitar BC Rich B.C. — $1,499
item.description:
$1,499 · Good · Get B.C. Rich or die trying

1982, Scorpion, Latt managed the BCR shop in Tijuana, he attempted his own guitar line. Crafted along side BCR's in Tijuana Mexico by BCR luthiers. Factory lined fretless. Badass bridge, Bill Lawrence pickups, looks like maybe koa under the paint. Plays well, sounds good, feels like a vintage USA B.C. Rich.

item.title: 1973 Rickenbacker 4001 Bass Mapleglo w/OHSC- Great Setup — $4,300
item.description:
$4,300 · Very Good · Mojo Guitar Shop

Here is a gorgeous vintage Rickenbacker bass guitar crafted in America in 1973. It has the outstanding tone and playability that you would expect from a 70’s Rickenbacker, and as a result has been loved and played for years. This was an active duty bass in a Latin band according to the original owner. 


The playability is exactly what you want- perfect neck straightness/relief, great action, no bad buzz, and in tune up and down the neck. Setup with super low action (2.6mm bass side). See pictures for fret life. The electronics work seamlessly with no bad noise, and the Grover tuners are quality and extremely stable. 


Cosmetically, the pictures will tell you the story here. It has an unbelievable mojo and really just looks badass. The string muting system on the bridge needs to be tuned up if you want to use it (although I never see anyone ever use it haha)- the muter foam doesn’t touch the strings on the bass side. This bass comes with the original hardshell case, and has been kept in smoke free and odor free home. 


The used sold listings of these in this year go up to $4000 all day (for mint examples). For played-in examples, they range from $2,800-$3,500 all day. Anything below that seems to have cracks or something seriously wrong with it. I believe this is a fair price for a killer piece of music history that will give you great tone for years to come. 


Feel free to ask any questions about the condition or shipping! I take packing guitars for shipping very seriously so it will be done properly. Please note that for buyers outside of the United States, additional customs, duties, or taxes may be added.








C.F. Martin , Taylor , Guild , Seagull , Fender , Aria , Breedlove , Ibanez , D’Angelico , Danelectro , Eastwood , Fernandez , G&L , Giannini , Godin , Gretsch , Harmony , Heritage , Hofner , Kalamazoo , Nashville , Luna , Maestro , Matsumoku , Yamaha , Music Man , PRS , Yairi , Peavy , Recording King , Rickenbacker , Silvertone , Takamine , Teisco , Univox , Vox , Washburn , Marshall , Orange , Gibson, Marshall , Magnavox , Vox , Bugera , Bogner , Mesa Boogie , Peavy , Crate , Aguilar , Analog Man , Behringer , Boss , Chandler , Cry Baby , D’Addario , Dunlop , Elecro-Harmonix , Fishman , JHS , Pedal , Line 6 , Seymour Duncan , Strymon , Supro , Yamaha

item.title: Epiphone Rivoli VCSB 1995 - Vintage Cherry Sunburst — $1,600
item.description:
$1,600 · Very Good · Aaron's Bass Guitars

Model: Rivoli (RIVOLI VCSB)

Year: 1995

Finish: Vintage Cherry Sunburst

Pickups: 1 Sidewinder Humbucker

Controls: 1 Volume, 1 Tone, 1 Baritone/Bass Boost Button

Case: Original Epiphone Hard Case Included

Up for sale is a beautiful mid-90s Epiphone Rivoli semi-hollowbody bass in a stunning Vintage Cherry Sunburst finish (VCSB). The model number is RIVOLI VCSB and the serial number is R95E6131, dating this reissue to 1995

This bass features a single powerful neck humbucker, master volume and tone controls, and the classic push-button bass boost switch. It has that iconic, deep vintage thump perfect for rock, blues, and indie styles.

The instrument is in great cosmetic shape with minimal wear for its age, plays smoothly, and sounds fantastic. It comes with the original Epiphone hard shell (case shows some normal exterior scuffs and wear but functions perfectly).

item.title: Squier Paranormal Rascal Bass HH - Black Metallic — $389.99
item.description:
$389.99 · Mint · T-Town Music Shop

About this bass:
Weight: 9.1 pounds
This bass was sent directly from Squier to my supplier as part of an end of production run by Squier.  It has never been sold retail, the protective covers are still on the tuners, pickups, back plate and pickguard.  It was inspected by a team of factory authorized technicians.  All electronics work as designed, the neck is straight, and the set up is to factory specs. When we polished the bass we did not find any blemishes, dings or cracks, it is in mint condition.
Per agreement with Fender/Squier because this bass was not distributed through their dealer network there is a tiny used stamp on the back of the headstock and the last two digits of the stamped serial number have been removed and a sticker with the serial number has been placed over the stamped number.

Here is what Squier says about the Paranormal Rascal Bass HH:
The Paranormal Rascal bass rewrites the playbook of electric bass design with a greatest-hits-list of features from several eccentric 1960s-era Fender bass models. Combining the offset body shape of the Fender bass VI model, the unique headstock shape from the Fender Coronado bass, the string-through-body bridge from the Mustang bass, and punchy dual Fender-designed wide range humbucking bass pickups with three-way switching, this model amounts to something truly greater than the sum of its parts. Other player-friendly details of this model include a short and easy-to-play 30" scale length, a slim and comfortable "C"-shape neck profile, and a gloss neck finish for a slick yet confident feel.


**The pictures are of the actual bass that you will receive**
 

Here is how much cash you will save!
Retail Price $449.99
My Price $389.99
Save $60.00

Features

Neck

  • Shape: Slim C
  • Wood: Solid Maple
  • Neck joint: Bolt-on
  • Scale length: 30"
  • Truss rod: Single action, head adjust
  • Finish: Gloss

Pickups

  • Pickup configuration: HH
  • Neck: Proprietary
  • Bridge: Proprietary
  • Control layout: Master volume, Master tone
  • Pickup switch: 3-Way

Fretboard

  • Material: Solid Laurel
  • Fret size: Narrow-Tall
  • Number of frets: 21
  • Inlays: Offset Pearloid Dot
  • Nut material/width: 1.5" Synthetic Bone

Body

  • Body Type: Solid Body
  • Body wood: Solid Poplar
  • Body finish: Gloss

Hardware

  • Tuning machines: Vintage-style
  • Color: Chrome

FAQ, frequently asked questions


Why are instruments sent to a refurbisher?  This bass is an end of production model from Squier so they were cleaning out excess inventory from their warehouse.

Who refurbishes your instruments?  All of my instruments come from the largest and best refurbisher in the country, where any issue found is corrected by a factory trained and authorized luthier.

Does a refurbished instrument have the manufacturer warranty?  No, any instrument sent to a refurbisher, regardless of the reason it was sent there, no longer carries the manufacturer warranty.

Will I need to set up my instrument when I receive it?  All of my instruments have been set-up before shipping, so most are ready to play out of the box.  However some instruments may need a minor adjustment after shipping due to changes in temperature, humidity, and  getting bumped around during shipping.  Also some players like to set up a new bass to their own personal preferences.

item.title: Fender Jazz Elite 2016 — $1,650
item.description:
$1,650 · Very Good · String, Things, and BaDa-Bing!

Fantastic condition but just some minor pick scratches! She's a stunner 😲! Includes original case.

item.title: Fender ‘62 AVRI 2008 - Olympic White — $1,800
item.description:
$1,800 · Very Good · Guitars (& Pedals!) From Mars

Fender ‘62 American Vintage Reissue from 2008. Finish is Olympic White (nitro) beginning to fade to a light mint color. These don’t come up very often and are highly sought after, particularly in this color. I prefer a 9.5” radius vs the 7.25” vintage radius on the ‘62. That’s the only reason I’m parting with this amazing bass. It plays and sounds great!

Condition is excellent although I am listing as very good in order to exceed expectations. There are a few minor divots (one on upper bout and one on the back both are tiny) and some minor play wear. No finish cracks, chips etc… I am grading this example an 8/10.

Alder body, maple neck and rosewood fingerboard. Neck is straight with minimal relief and truss rod works perfectly. Reverse style tuners and strung with new La Bella Low Tension Flats. Frets have lots of life left, see pics. Action is low at 5/64” on the E and 4/64” on the G. Neck relief is minimal (0.009”). You may need to adjust according to your playing style (I have a very light touch). Original AVRI split coil pickups and electronics. No mods or replacement parts. Weight is 9lbs.

Original tweed case (with keys), owners manual and strap. Case is a G&G made for Fender and is in very good condition.

item.title: 1979 Fender International Series Precision Bass Moroccan Red w/OHSC — $1,995
item.description:
$1,995 · Good · Imperial Vintage Guitars

This Is Located At Our Brick And Mortar Store In San Diego, CA 

1979 Fender International Series Precision Bass 

Player Grade Condition - Finish Overspray - Please See All Photos 

In Good Overall Condition - Small Nicks And Scratches - Please See All Photos 

Original Moroccan Red Finish Remains in the Neck Pocket And Most Of The Cavities - You Can See The Factory Stickers Remain

Original Pickup And Electronics 

Replacement Pickguard 

Original Tuning Machines 

Original Frets Show Wear - Playability Is Just Fine 

Weighs In At 11 Pounds 4 Ounces 

Nut Width: 1.61" 

Neck Depth: .81" At The 1st Fret - .91" At The 12th Fret 

Comes With The Original Fender Hardshell Case Shown In Photos 

The 1979 Fender International Series Precision Bass in Moroccan Red is a rare and collectible late-’70s Fender bass featuring one of the brand’s most distinctive finishes. Built during the era of Fender’s renowned American production, this Precision Bass delivers the legendary split-coil tone, powerful low end, and unmistakable punch that defined generations of players. With its bold color, classic styling, and vintage Fender feel, the International Series Precision Bass is a standout instrument for collectors and working musicians alike.

item.title: G&L Tribute Series JB Jazz Bass - Lake Placid Blue — $649.95
item.description:
$649.95 · Brand New · T-Town Music Shop

About this bass:
Weight: 8.9 pounds

G & L ceased operations in 2025.  My supplier, MIRC, purchased all of their remaining brand new inventory.  We gave it a fresh polish when we received it, these are the last of their kind made by G & L, when these are gone that is the end of the line.  Check out some of the reviews online, they rave about this bass, and after testing it myself I agree, this is a keeper.
All protective covers are still on the bass, ships in the original box with accessories.

Description:

Players fond of the old adage “if it ain’t broke…” haven’t played a JB. You see, the G&L JB is all about refinement, blending classic Alnico single-coil tone with modern improvements and superb craftsmanship.   

This JB projects a time-honored yet subtly progressive vibe, embracing the past yet unafraid of moving forward. The slim, hard-rock maple neck features a classic gloss finish, while its comfortable 9″ radius and medium-jumbo nickel frets deliver modern playability. What’s more, the JB features an innovative Leo Fender-designed Saddle-Lock bridge to transfer string energy right into the body end-grain for an incredibly resonant instrument. Once you play a G&L Tribute Series, you’ll never look back.


**The pictures are of the actual bass that you will receive**

Specifications:

  • CONSTRUCTION: bolt-on
  • SCALE: 34"
  • PICKUPS: 2x G&L Alnico single coil pickups
  • BODY WOOD: Poplar & Ash Top over Poplar
  • NECK WOOD: Hard Rock Maple with vintage tint satin finish and Maple or Rosewood fingerboard
  • NECK WIDTH AT NUT: 1 1/2"
  • NECK RADIUS: 12”
  • NECK PROFILE: medium C
  • FRETS: medium jumbo, nickel
  • TUNING KEYS: Traditional open-back
  • BRIDGE: Leo Fender-designed G&L Saddle-Lock
  • ELECTRONICS: one volume control for each pickup, master tone


FAQ, frequently asked questions

Why was this guitar sent to MIRC? G & L ceased operations in 2025.  MIRC purchased all of their remaining inventory, resulting in my ability to offer a brand new guitar at a great price

Will I need to set up my instrument when I receive it?  All of my instruments have been set-up before shipping, so most are ready to play out of the box.  However some instruments may need a minor adjustment after shipping due to changes in temperature, humidity, and  getting bumped around during shipping.  Also some players like to set up a new guitar to their own personal preferences.

item.title: 2022 Fender Vintera '70s Jazz Bass Inca Silver — $699
item.description:
$699 · Excellent · rEvolve Guitar and Music Shop

Up for sale is a used 2022 Fender Vintera II Jazz Bass in Inca Silver. Excellent condition with some marks on the black pickguard and pickup covers and a few light marks on the control plate. Some light hardware aging, minimal fretwear. Bass weighs 9 lbs 5.2oz. Includes a basic gig bag. Shipping is $85 anywhere in the continental US. Thank you for looking!

item.title: Squier FSR Classic Vibe Late '60s Jazz Bass - Lake Placid Blue — $459.99
item.description:
$459.99 · Mint · T-Town Music Shop

About this bass:
Weight: 8.2 pounds
Year of Production: 2025
Overstock of a Fender Special Run model, ships in original box with accessories


This bass came directly from Squier to my supplier, it has never been sold retail.  The protective covers are still on the pickups, pickguard, control plate, tuners and back plate.  All electronics were tested and are working as designed, the neck is straight and the set up is to factory specs.  
When we polished the bass we did not find any blemishes, dings or cracks, it is in new condition.
Per agreement with Fender/Squier because this bass was not distributed through their dealer network there is a tiny used stamp on the back of the headstock and the last two digits of the stamped serial number have been removed and a sticker with the serial number has been placed over the stamped number.


Here is what Squier says about the FSR Classic Vibe L60s Jazz Bass:

A tribute to the decade of its birth, the Classic Vibe Late '60s Jazz Bass® combines the luxurious playability that made it famous with the versatility and massive tone of its dual Fender-Designed alnico single-coil pickups. Player-friendly features include a slim, comfortable "C"-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5"-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets, as well as a vintage-style bridge with threaded saddles. This throwback Squier model also features 1960s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.

**The pictures are of the actual bass that you will receive**
 

Here is how much cash you will save!
Retail Price $549.99
My Price $459.99
Save $70.00

Specs

Neck

  • Shape: C
  • Wood: Maple
  • Neck joint: Bolt-on
  • Scale length: 34"
  • Truss rod: Standard
  • Finish: Vintage tint gloss

Pickups

  • Active or passive pickups: Passive
  • Pickup configuration: SS
  • Neck: Fender Designed Alnico single-coil
  • Bridge: Fender Designed Alnico single-coil
  • Brand: Fender
  • Series or parallel: Parallel

Fretboard

  • Material: Indian laurel
  • Radius: 9.5"
  • Fret size: Narrow Tall
  • Number of frets: 20
  • Inlays: Dot
  • Nut material: Bone
  • Nut width: 1.5" (38.1 mm)

Body

  • Cutaway: Double cutaway
  • Construction: Solidbody
  • Top wood: Poplar
  • Body finish: Gloss
  • Orientation: Right handed

Controls

  • Control layout: Volume 1, volume 2, master tone

Hardware

  • Bridge type: Fixed
  • Bridge design: 4-saddle vintage style with threaded steel saddles
  • Tuning machines: Open-geared vintage style
  • Color: Nickel

FAQ, frequently asked questions


Why are instruments sent to a refurbisher?  The instrument could be a discontinued model, have a finish imperfection, or need a minor repair.

Who refurbishes your instruments?  All of my instruments come from the largest and best refurbisher in the country, where any issue found is corrected by a factory trained and authorized luthier.

Does a refurbished instrument have the manufacturer warranty?  No, any instrument sent to a refurbisher, regardless of the reason it was sent there, no longer carries the manufacturer warranty. 

Will I need to set up my instrument when I receive it?  All of my instruments have been set-up before shipping, so most are ready to play out of the box.  However some instruments may need a minor adjustment after shipping due to changes in temperature, humidity, and  getting bumped around during shipping.  Also some players like to set up a new bass to their own personal preferences.

item.title: Fender Vintera III Early 60’s Jazz Bass 2026 - Olympic White — $1,100
item.description:
$1,100 · Excellent · Yves' Gear Outlet

Just got this bass last month, played a couple times. Great bass. Put some TI Jazz flats on it. Comes with the rare stack knob configuration. Slab Rosewood fretboard, maple neck. Basically brand new. Nothing wrong with it at all. Comes with the original gigbag. $1350 MSRP price, paid $1500 with tax and shipping.

Asking $1100 OBO.

- Can deliver to LA county area.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '60s Mustang Bass 2019 - Present - Surf Green — $350
item.description:
$350 · Excellent · Gear Emporium

Selling my Squier Classic Vibe Mustang Bass. Bass is in excellent condition. I bought another bass so that’s why I’m looking to sell this one. Really great bass for a beginner too as well.

item.title: Schecter Riot-4 Session Electric Bass in Aged Natural Satin Finish — $949
item.description:
$949 · Brand New · Studio Gears

Schecter Riot-4 Session Electric Bass in Aged Natural Satin Finish

The Riot-4 Session delivers a balanced, comfortable playing experience with its 'C'-shaped maple neck and thoughtfully dimensioned body contours. This bolt-on construction bass combines swamp ash warmth with active electronics, making it equally suited to session work, studio tracking, or live performance.

Playability & Build

The 34-inch scale and 1.496-inch nut width provide familiar positioning for four-string players, while the 24 Narrow X-Jumbo frets and 12-inch fingerboard radius support clean articulation across the neck. Neck thickness tapers from .826 inches at the 1st fret to .905 inches at the 12th, offering responsive feel without sacrificing stability thanks to the 2-way adjustable truss rod.

Tone & Electronics

A Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut pairs with EMG active pickups—the 35DC bridge pickup and 35J neck pickup—to deliver punchy, controlled low-end and articulate mids. The Master Volume/Blend with 3-Band EMG Active E/Q and 18-volt battery compartment provide surgical tone-shaping for any session demand.

Key Features
  • Body Material: Swamp Ash with Aged Natural Satin finish
  • Bolt-on construction with flat top and beveled edge contours
  • Maple neck and maple fingerboard with ebony side block inlays
  • 24 Narrow X-Jumbo frets on 34-inch (863mm) scale
  • 12-inch (305mm) fingerboard radius with 'C'-shaped neck profile
  • Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut, 1.496-inch width
  • 2-Way adjustable truss rod with 5/32-inch Allen nut
  • EMG 35DC bridge pickup and EMG 35J neck pickup
  • Master Volume/Blend with 3-Band EMG Active E/Q
  • 18-volt active electronics with screw-plate battery compartment
  • Schecter Custom String Thru bridge with black hardware
  • Grover Bass 144 Series tuners with metal knurled knobs and set screws

The Riot-4 Session combines session-grade electronics and hardware with a lightweight swamp ash body, delivering reliability and tonal flexibility in a production-quality instrument.
